queries.question: Which companies produced drama films and who acted as producer?
queries.sql: SELECT ProducerName, Company FROM Producers JOIN Movies ON Producers.id = Movies.ProducerId WHERE Genre LIKE '%Drama%' ;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?producername ?company WHERE {
  ?producers a :Producer .
  ?movies a :Movie .
  ?movies p:hasProducers ?producers .
  ?producers p:ProducerName ?producername .
  ?producers p:Company ?company .
  ?movies p:Genre ?genre_lk .
  FILTER(REGEX(STR(?genre_lk), "^.*Drama.*$", "i"))
}

queries.question: What is the name of the producer and company that made the films with a G rating?
queries.sql: SELECT ProducerName, Company FROM Producers JOIN Movies ON Producers.id = Movies.ProducerId JOIN MovieRatings ON MovieRatings.MovieId = Movies.id JOIN FilmRatings ON MovieRatings.RatingId = FilmRatings.id WHERE Rating = 'G' ;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?producername ?company WHERE {
  ?producers a :Producer .
  ?movies a :Movie .
  ?movies p:hasProducers ?producers .
  ?movieratings a :MovieRatings .
  ?movieratings p:hasMovies ?movies .
  ?filmratings a :FilmRatings .
  ?movieratings p:hasFilmRatings ?filmratings .
  ?producers p:ProducerName ?producername .
  ?producers p:Company ?company .
  ?filmratings p:Rating ?rating_f .
  FILTER(STR(?rating_f) = "G")
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Who produced drama films?
Who produced the films with a general rating?
